name: heramb
description: The key to effortless deployment across any platform

scripts.build: npm run build -w @heramb1/core && npm run build -w @heramb1/provider-railway -w @heramb1/provider-vercel -w @heramb1/provider-upstash -w @heramb1/provider-netlify && npm run build -w @heramb1/cli && npm run build -w @heramb1/api && npm run build -w @heramb1/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.publish:packages: npm run build && npm publish -w @heramb1/core --access public && npm publish -w @heramb1/provider-railway --access public && npm publish -w @heramb1/provider-vercel --access public && npm publish -w @heramb1/provider-upstash --access public && npm publish -w @heramb1/provider-netlify --access public && npm publish -w @heramb1/cli --access public
scripts.deploy:web: npm run build -w @heramb1/web && npx wrangler pages deploy packages/web/dist --project-name=heramb
